title: Subscription Business Builder
description:
I’m looking for someone who wants to help build and grow a subscription-based business from the ground up.

 I’m looking for someone who thinks like an operator—someone who understands recurring revenue, customer retention, and building systems that scale.

This is a paid position with weekly payouts.

What I’m Looking For:

Experience with subscriptions, memberships, or recurring revenue models

Has built or worked on something before (even small projects)

Strong problem-solver and takes initiative

Good communication and reliable

Thinks long-term and wants to grow with something



Compensation:

Weekly pay (based on experience)

2. Have you worked on a subscription or membership business before?

3. What tools/platforms have you used (e.g.
 marketing, funnels, automation)?

title: Content Feedback Manager: $1,000–$1,200 USD Start | Growth to $1,500+
description:
Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS

- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Content & Client Feedback



- Review 30-60 short-form client videos (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) per day in our Slack feedback channel -before they are published

- Give constructive, actionable feedback on hooks (verbal/headline/visual), scripting, pacing, editing, and CTA, making sure each client knows exactly how to improve

- Cross-reference each piece of content with client niche, experience, and goals as outlined in their files

- Review previous feedback to ensure consistency and avoid contradictions

- Quality-control content ideas created by our Content Research Experts before delivery to the client, ensuring fit with niche, experience, and likely performance

- Oversee workload balance among Content Research Experts and make sure no one on the team is overloaded or underutilized

- Respond to client questions or tech issues in Slack within 24 hours

- Be tough but fair—only approve content that meets quality standards



Progress Tracking



- Complete daily End-of-Day (EOD) reports

- Attend daily tea
eting (mandatory, 3pm CET)

- Keep internal feedback and client progress records up to date



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)

- C1+ English (written), with perfect grammar and clear, professional responses

- Significant experience creating or reviewing short-form content for Instagram Reels, TikTok, or YouTube Shorts

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet, professional home workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment

- Long-term commitment, eager to master a workflow and have direct impact on client success



IMPORTANT



- When recording a Loom video as part of your application:

- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Experience supporting creators and social media beginners, especially ages 45+

- Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT, CapCut, etc.

- Strong understanding of trends/strategy for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $800 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,000–$1,200 a month once trained)

Note: Senior CFMs earn $1,500+ after 6–12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $400+ additional monthly based on:

- Quality and clarity of feedback

- Task completion and consistency

- Teamwork and responsibility

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise, direct to your bank

- Tools access: All tools/software fully covered

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Frequent feedback and advanced training



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CFM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with content feedback or coaching.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio (including examples of your feedback or video/content work).



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Video Editor / Motion Graphic Designer | 1.6M+ Subscribers on YouTube

ABOUT US

We're a small team that's passionate about creating the highest quality documentaries on YouTube. With plans to expand across multiple platforms, we're looking for people who want to grow with us and who want to be part of building something impactful. We are looking for tea
mbers who share the vision of making the world a better place.

title: Business Development Specialist (Part-Time – 5 Hours/Day)
description:
We are a U.S.-based company looking for a reliable, proactive, and detail-oriented Business Development Specialist to join our team.



You will be working across two businesses:

• Vantage Creative Company – a media and marketing agency helping small and medium-sized businesses grow through social media, branding, and increasing online sales.

• Vantage Stays – a real estate investment company focused on corporate housing, landlord partnerships, and helping homeowners with property solutions nationwide.



Both businesses are brand new and are looking to grow rapidly, and we’re looking for the right person to help make that happen.



Position Details:



-Part-time: 5 hours per day

-Long-term opportunity with room for growth

-Remote position



Responsibilities:



-Client acquisition and lead generation

-Outreach to potential clients (Phone,
, social media, etc.)

-Managing communications and follow-ups

-Administrative support

-Assisting with social media and marketing coordination

-Helping streamline day-to-day operations



What We’re Looking For:



-Strong communication skills (written and verbal)

-Organized and detail-oriented

-Self-motivated and proactive

-Comfortable with outreach and talking to potential clients

-Experience in sales, lead generation, or marketing is a plus

-Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Why Work With Us:

This is an opportunity to be part of two businesses from the ground up and play a direct role in their growth. We’re looking for someone who wants more than just tasks—we want someone who takes ownership and helps drive real results.



We keep things professional, but we also like working with people who have personality. If you’re reliable, motivated, and ready to be part of something growing, you’ll fit in well here.



How to Apply:

1. A brief introduction about yourself

We’re looking forward to finding the right person to join our team.

title: Instagram DM Setter & Lead Conversion Specialist (Fitness Coaching Brand)
description:
Instagram DM Setter & Lead Conversion Specialist



Pay: $5–$7/hour + performance bonuses

Schedule: Up to 2 hours per day (including weekends)

Location: Remote



About the Role

We’re hiring an Instagram DM Setter to help manage inbound conversations and turn engagement into booked consultation calls for a growing online fitness coaching business, Transform-Nation Fitness.

This is NOT a cold outreach or spa
ssaging role. Every conversation is with someone who has already shown interest through content, stories, or engagement.

Your role is to build genuine conversations, create trust, and guide potential clients toward taking the next step.



You will be using proven scripts and systems to:

• Respond to inbound Instagram DMs

• Engage with comments, story replies, and active followers

• Qualify potential leads by understanding their goals and challenges

• Book consultation calls



This is a great role for someone who enjoys connecting with people, can move quickly, and takes pride in doing high-quality work.



What Success Looks Like

In this role, DMs are treated like live conversations, not
s.

Speed, care, and attention to detail matter.



You will:

- Respond quickly to inbound messages using our scripts and frameworks

- Qualify leads by learning about their goals, struggles, and readiness

- Book consultation calls using our scheduling process

- Track conversations, follow-ups, and booked calls in our CRM

- Consistently follow up with leads

- Manage your time effectively and stay on top of conversations



We care deeply about quality over quantity. Every conversation should feel natural, helpful, and professional.



Who This Role Is Perfect For

You’ll thrive here if you:

-Enjoy talking to people and building genuine connections

-Naturally respond quickly and stay organized

-Can follow systems while keeping conversations human and engaging

-Pay attention to details and don’t miss follow-ups

-Are reliable and communicate clearly with a remote team

-Have stable internet and a focused work environment



The Traits We Value Most:

We operate with high standards. The person in our DMs represents the brand.



We look for:

Ownership – You take responsibility and improve quickly from feedback

Urgency – You treat conversations like real-time interactions

Strong Communication – Clear, professional, and engaging

Integrity & Excellence – No shortcuts, no sloppy work

Positive Attitude – Solutions-focused and consistent

Coachability – Open to feedback and eager to grow



Training & Support

We provide everything you need to succeed:

-Proven scripts and conversation frameworks

-Messaging tone and DM guidelines

-Coaching for different lead scenarios

-Ongoing feedback and support

You will not be expected to figure things out on your own.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to help people connect with life-changing coaching while building valuable communication and sales skills, we’d love to hear from you.



IMPORTANT You will be asked to answer the following questions when submitting a proposal:

title: Data entry/ personal assistant
description:
Role: NYC Restaurant Researcher — Let's Get Lunch

Let's Get Lunch (letsgetlunch.nyc) is a NYC platform that helps office workers find prix-fixe lunch deals at real restaurants. We're populating our directory with restaurants that publicly advertise lunch specials. I'm hiring one researcher for ongoing part-time work — start with a paid trial of 10 restaurants, then scale to 20–30 hours/week if it goes well.

What you'll do, per restaurant:

Research the restaurant on the web (their website, Instagram, Google Maps, Yelp) and confirm they publicly advertise a lunch special or prix-fixe lunch menu.

Capture: name, full address, neighborhood, cuisine, lunch special description, price, hours, days available, and the public source (URL + date).

Find the restaurant's contact info — general phone number, general
 if listed, and ideally the manager or marketing person's name and contact.

If the manager's
 isn't public, call the restaurant during off-peak hours (3–5 PM Eastern Time, NYC) and politely ask: "Hi, I'm researching lunch deals for a NYC website that drives free traffic to restaurants. Could I have the
 of whoever handles your marketing or lunch specials?"

Select 1–3 photos from the restaurant's own public sources (their website or Instagram) that accurately represent the restaurant's food and atmosphere. Save photo URLs. Do NOT pick photos from food blogs, Yelp user uploads, or stock images.

Enter all of this into a 
 & Google Sheet I'll provide. One row per restaurant.

Volume target: 7-10 restaurants per hour at part-time hours. Quality matters more than speed.

What you won't do: make any commitments to restaurants, represent yourself as the owner of the site, scrape platforms with login walls, or upload photos to my actual website (you'll provide URLs; I handle uploads).

Hours: Flexible, but research-only work can be done any time. Restaurant phone calls must happen 3–5 PM Eastern Time, which is 3–5 AM Manila time (this is the constraint — confirm you can do this). About 30 minutes of phone calling per day is expected.

Trial: Paid trial of 10 restaurants at your hourly rate. If quality is good, ongoing engagement at agreed hours per week

title: Quickbooks Bookkeeper
description:
QuickBooks Bookkeeper



Position Summary



We are looking for a detail-oriented QuickBooks Bookkeeper to manage day-to-day financial records, keep accounts organized, and ensure accurate reporting. This role is responsible for maintaining clean books, reconciling accounts, processing transactions, supporting invoicing and bill payments, and providing financial reports that help leadership make informed business decisions.



The ideal candidate is highly organized, accurate, trustworthy, and experienced with QuickBooks Online.



Key Responsibilities

Bookkeeping & Financial Recordkeeping

Maintain accurate financial records in QuickBooks Online.

Record and categorize income, expenses, transfers, payments, deposits, and journal entries.

Ensure transactions are properly coded to the correct accounts, classes, departments, clients, or projects.

Keep the chart of accounts organized and up to date.

Bank & Credit Card Reconciliation

Reconcile bank accounts, credit cards, loans, and merchant/payment accounts monthly.

Identify and resolve discrepancies quickly.

Monitor uncleared transactions and unusual account activity.

Accounts Receivable

Create and send invoices as needed.

Track customer payments and outstanding balances.

Follow up on overdue invoices when requested.

Apply payments correctly in QuickBooks.

Accounts Payable

Enter vendor bills and expenses.

Track due dates and assist with bill payment preparation.

Maintain vendor records and W-9 information.

Help prepare 1099 information at year-end.

Payroll & Contractor Support

Coordinate payroll information with the payroll provider or internal payroll system.

Track contractor payments and payroll-related expenses.

Ensure payroll entries are accurately reflected in QuickBooks.

Reporting

Prepare monthly financial reports, including:

Profit & Loss Statement

Balance Sheet

Cash Flow Report

Accounts Receivable Aging

Accounts Payable Aging

Budget vs. Actual, if applicable

Provide leadership with clear summaries of financial trends, concerns, and action items.

Month-End Close

Complete monthly close tasks on schedule.

Reconcile all accounts and review financial statements for accuracy.

Ensure books are current and ready for CPA review.

Assist with year-end cleanup and tax preparation.

Administrative & Compliance Support

Maintain organized digital records of receipts, invoices, bills, statements, and financial documents.

Work with CPA or tax professional as needed.

Support audits, tax filings, and financial documentation requests.

Maintain confidentiality of all company financial information.

Required Qualifications

Proven bookkeeping experience.

Strong experience using QuickBooks Online.

Understanding of basic accounting principles.

Experience with bank and credit card reconciliations.

Ability to read and prepare basic financial reports.

Strong attention to detail and accuracy.

Excellent organizational and time-management skills.

Ability to meet deadlines and maintain consistent bookkeeping schedules.

High level of discretion and confidentiality.

Preferred Qualifications

QuickBooks ProAdvisor certification.

Experience with small business bookkeeping.

Experience with service-based businesses, agencies, contractors, or recurring billing businesses.

Familiarity with payroll systems, merchant processors, bill pay platforms, or expense management tools.

Experience preparing books for CPA review and year-end tax filing.

Skills Needed

QuickBooks Online

Bank reconciliation

Accounts receivable

Accounts payable

Expense categorization

Financial reporting

Month-end close

Vendor and customer record management

Spreadsheet skills

Communication and follow-through

title: APS Consulting Recruitment Notice
description:
APS Consulting is a Sydney-based advisory firm providing comprehensive strategic consulting services to clients worldwide. As we continue to expand our global footprint, we are seeking experienced Overseas Consultants with strong expertise in government relations, and a deep understanding of political affairs, economics, law, and public policy.



Scope of Work and Responsibilities  

Consultants in this role primarily support research, policy analysis, and advisory work related to overseas political, regulatory, and governance developments. Typical tasks include:



Conducting background research and policy monitoring



Stakeholder mapping and engagement analysis



Drafting analytical briefs and memos



Supporting scenario planning and risk assessments for client decision-making



Types of Clients and Projects  

Our clients generally include private enterprises, professional institutions, and organizations with cross-border interests that require an informed understanding of overseas political, regulatory, or public-sector environments. Projects are research- and analysis-driven, and may relate to:



Public policy trends



Government processes



Geopolitical risk assessments



Work Structure (approximately 20 hours per week)  

This is a flexible, part-time consultancy arrangement. Work is typically project-based, with weekly hours varying depending on deliverables and timelines. Coordination is conducted remotely, and schedules are discussed in advance to align with both project requirements and consultant availability.

Team Lead which will be responsible for training and overseeing the other VA's

Guest communication

Coordination with cleaners and maintenance

Add and update new listings to Airbnb and other platforms such VRBO, BDC etc.

Complete all admin tasks per schedule

Submit reviews and damage claims

Complete various reports and much more

title: Video Podcast Content Editor – Video, Short-Form & Graphics
description:
I'm looking for an experienced podcast editor who can do more than just cut an episode. I need someone who understands how to take a podcast recording and turn it into a full content package — long-form video, short-form clips, graphics, captions, trailers, and thumbnails.

Compensation & Terms



$600/month – Full-Time

3-month trial period to start

Long-term position for the right person



What You'll Be Responsible For



• Editing full-length video podcast episodes (long-form)

• Creating short-form clips and Reels from episodes

• Designing and adding captions, lower thirds, and graphics

• Building intro and trailer sequences — including using AI-generated b-roll where needed

• Designing thumbnails for YouTube and social platforms

• Using AI tools to enhance overall production quality and efficiency



What I'm Looking For



1. Must have experience editing podcasts — general video editing experience alone is not enough

2. Comfortable working across both long-form and short-form formats

3. Knows how to use AI tools to support the editing workflow — your choice of tools

4. Strong eye for graphics, captions, and on-screen text that fits each platform

5. Can design clean, eye-catching thumbnails

6. Reliable, organized, and able to manage multiple deliverables per episode



Software:

Preferred: Final Cut Pro X

Also accepted: Adobe Premiere Pro



To Apply

Please include all of the following or your application will not be considered:



• At least 2 examples of podcast episodes you have edited — video format preferred

• An example of a trailer or intro you created

• Examples of thumbnails you have designed

• An example of short-form content pulled from a longer video

• Tell me what AI tools you currently use in your editing workflow

• Start your application with the phrase "full package" so I know you read this

title: Social Media & Content Assistant (Real Estate)
description:
About Us



We are a high-producing real estate team based in Hawaii, specializing in military relocation, VA loans, and residential sales. Our team has helped clients buy and sell hundreds of homes and is focused on scaling to the next level through consistent, high-quality social media content.



Role Overview



We are looking for a Social Media & Content Assistant to help us create, edit, and manage content across platforms like Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is focused on execution and consistency — turning ideas, videos, and voice notes into engaging content that generates leads and builds our brand.



Key Responsibilities



Content Creation & Posting



Edit short-form videos (Reels, TikToks, Shorts)

Add captions, subtitles, and basic graphics

Write engaging captions with strong hooks and CTAs

Schedule and post content across all platforms



Content Repurposing



Turn 1 video into multiple pieces of content

Create carousel posts from scripts or ideas

Repurpose content for different platforms



Engagement & Community Management



Respond to comments and basic DMs

Flag potential leads or important messages



Organization & Workflow



Manage content calendar

Keep track of posted content and performance

Organize media files (Google Drive/Dropbox)

What We’re Looking For

Experience editing short-form video (CapCut, Canva, or similar)

Strong understanding of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube trends

Ability to write simple, engaging captions

Organized and consistent with deadlines

Basic understanding of real estate content (preferred, not required)

Bonus Skills (Not Required)

Experience with real estate marketing

Familiarity with VA loans or relocation content

Graphic design (Canva)

Experience with scheduling tools (Meta Business Suite, Later, etc.)

Tools We Use

Follow Up Boss (CRM)

Google Drive

Instagram,
, TikTok, YouTube

Canva / CapCut

Compensation

based on experience and workload

Opportunity for growth and long-term role

How to Apply



Please submit:



Links to 2–3 social media accounts or videos you’ve edited

A short message on why you’re a good fit

Your monthly rate

What Success Looks Like

Consistent daily/weekly posting

Increased engagement and followers

Content that generates real estate leads



We are looking for someone long-term who wants to grow with our team and be a key part of our marketing engine.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
Graphic Designer (Paid Media & Social) – BellaFina Outdoors



Remote (Philippines-Based | PST Overlap Required)



About BellaFina Outdoors:



BellaFina Outdoors is a contractor-first outdoor living design center that transforms how pool builders and contractors bring their projects to life.

We provide a centralized, premium showroom experience where contractors bring clients to finalize all key outdoor project decisions in one place: materials, finishes, equipment, and design elements.

Our model simplifies decision-making, accelerates timelines, and elevates the overall client experience for high-value outdoor projects.



We sit at the intersection of luxury design, operational efficiency, and experiential retail, and our content must reflect that same level of clarity, sophistication, and impact.



About the Role:



We’re looking for a Graphic Designer with strong performance marketing instincts to support paid media and social content.

This is not just a design role. You will be responsible for translating complex, high-value outdoor projects into clear, compelling, and conversion-driven creative.



Your work will help contractors win clients and help homeowners confidently move forward with large-scale outdoor investments.



What You’ll Own:



• Design high-performing paid ad creatives for Meta 
/Instagram) and Google

• Create social-first content (posts, carousels, stories, thumbnails, reel covers)

• Transform raw project photos/videos into polished, premium visuals

• Develop before-and-after transformation content that communicates value clearly

• Create multiple variations of creatives to support testing and optimization

• Adapt designs across placements (feed, stories, display)

• Collaborate on messaging, hooks, and content direction

• Maintain a consistent luxury, contractor-aligned brand aesthetic



What We’re Looking For:



• 2+ years' experience in graphic design for paid ads and social media

• Strong portfolio showcasing performance-driven creative

• Experience with construction, real estate, or home services brands preferred

• Ability to take minimal direction and execute independently

• Strong understanding of conversion-focused design principles

• Ability to work in a fast-paced, content-heavy environment



Tools & Skills



• Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator)

• Canva (required)

• Figma (a plus)

• Strong layout, typography, and mobile-first design skills

Working Style

• Remote (Philippines-based)

• Partial PST overlap required

• Fast-paced environment with consistent output expectations

• Freelance/part-time with growth potential



What Success Looks Like:



• High-quality, on-brand creative delivered with minimal revisions

• Improved engagement, click-through rate, and lead generation

• Ability to quickly turn raw assets into compelling visual stories

• Reliable, low-touch execution partner



How to Apply:



• Portfolio (must include ad creatives and social content)

• Examples of transformation content (if available)

• Availability and rate

title: PPC Manager (Google & Bing Ads)
description:
Role Overview:

We are seeking an experienced PPC Manager to lead the development, execution, and optimization of paid search campaigns across both Google Ads and Bing Ads. The ideal candidate will have a hands-on understanding of both platforms and proven success managing large-scale, complex campaigns with significant budgets. You will be responsible for delivering results-driven campaigns that align with client goals while maintaining a deep understanding of industry best practices. Previous experience working at Google or a strong insider knowledge of Google Ads best practices is highly advantageous.

As a PPC Manager, you’ll be the go-to expert for all things paid search and will have a direct impact on client performance. The role requires a strategic mindset, data-driven decision-making, and the ability to maintain clear and effective communication with both internal teams and clients.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Paid Search Strategy & Execution:

Campaign Development & Management: Develop, launch, and manage paid search campaigns on Google Ads and Bing Ads, ensuring they are aligned with client objectives and maximize ROI. This includes campaigns on Google Search, Display, YouTube, Shopping, and Bing Search.

Keyword Research & Audience Targeting: Conduct extensive keyword research, competitor analysis, and audience segmentation to identify growth opportunities. Develop comprehensive strategies based on these insights to optimize targeting and bidding.

Campaign Optimization: Continuously analyze and refine campaigns to improve performance metrics such as CPC, CTR, CPA, and ROAS. Implement A/B testing strategies for ad creatives, landing pages, and bidding strategies to maximize conversions.

Ad Copy & Creative Strategy: Work closely with the creative team to ensure that ad copy, creatives, and landing pages are optimized for user engagement and aligned with campaign goals.

2. Client Communication & Consultation:

Client Liaison: Serve as the main point of contact for clients, providing expert consultation on all Google Ads and Bing Ads strategies. Clearly communicate campaign progress, adjustments, and results to ensure client satisfaction and alignment with business objectives.

Performance Reporting: Regularly prepare and present in-depth performance reports, including key performance metrics (CPC, CTR, CPA, ROAS) and actionable insights. Use these reports to showcase campaign successes and provide strategic recommendations for optimization.

Strategic Guidance: Offer strategic recommendations to clients, advising on how to improve campaign performance, expand reach, or address performance challenges. Proactively identify opportunities for growth.

Client Relationship Management: Build and nurture strong relationships with clients, becoming a trusted advisor on paid search and digital marketing. Ensure high levels of client satisfaction, resolve campaign-related issues, and manage client expectations effectively.

3. Budget Management & Performance Tracking:

Budget Oversight: Manage and optimize client budgets across both Google Ads and Bing Ads to ensure campaigns are efficient and within budget. Track and report on budget pacing and ensure that client goals are met while maximizing ROI.

Performance Tracking & Analysis: Utilize Google Analytics, Microsoft Advertising Intelligence, Google Tag Manager, and other analytics platforms to monitor campaign performance in real time. Assess KPIs such as CPC, CTR, CPA, and ROAS to ensure campaigns are delivering results within the defined parameters.

Optimization: Make data-driven decisions to optimize campaigns for better performance. Adjust bids, keywords, targeting, and ads based on performance trends and competitive insights.

4. Collaboration & Cross-Functional Alignment:

Team Collaboration: Work closely with the broader digital marketing team (SEO, Social Media, Creative, Web Development) to ensure that PPC campaigns are integrated into wider marketing and sales strategies. Align campaigns with broader business objectives, ensuring a cohesive approach across all digital channels.

Stakeholder Coordination: Collaborate with internal stakeholders to ensure paid search efforts align with company goals and support sales or product launch strategies.

Knowledge Sharing: Actively contribute to knowledge-sharing within the marketing team by educating peers about PPC best practices, emerging trends, and new tools or features in Google Ads and Bing Ads.

5. Industry Trend Awareness & Innovation:

Stay Current with PPC Trends: Stay up-to-date with the latest Google Ads and Bing Ads updates, features, and best practices. Attend webinars, conferences, and industry events to keep ahead of emerging trends and leverage new opportunities for clients.

Test New Strategies: Continuously evaluate and experiment with new tools, bidding strategies, and ad formats to ensure campaigns are always optimized and competitive. Propose new strategies to clients based on these findings.

6. Reporting & Data-Driven Insights:

Regular Reporting: Create and maintain regular performance reports, dashboards, and presentations to track campaign progress, analyze performance trends, and showcase ROI. Present these findings in a clear, concise manner to clients and internal teams.

Actionable Insights: Translate complex data into actionable insights that drive campaign improvements. Provide clear, data-backed recommendations to both internal and client stakeholders to guide future PPC strategies and decisions.

Attribution & Conversion Tracking: Implement and manage proper tracking systems to measure campaign effectiveness and provide accurate reporting on conversions, revenue, and other key metrics.



Qualifications:

Education:

Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience). Certifications in Google Ads and Bing Ads are a plus.



Experience:

Proven PPC Experience: Minimum of 3–5 years of hands-on experience managing PPC campaigns across Google Ads and Bing Ads. This includes experience in Google Search, Display, YouTube, Shopping, and Bing Search campaigns.

Agency or Client Experience: Experience working in a client-facing role, ideally in a digital marketing agency, managing multiple PPC accounts with large-scale budgets.

Experience at Google (Bonus): Previous experience working at Google or within a Google Partner agency is highly desirable, particularly if you have in-depth knowledge of Google Ads best practices, new features, and insights from working directly with the platform.



Technical Skills:

Google Ads & Bing Ads Expertise: Advanced proficiency in managing campaigns across Google Ads and Bing Ads, including search, display, shopping, remarketing, and video campaigns.

Analytics Tools Proficiency: Strong working knowledge of Google Analytics, Microsoft Advertising Intelligence, Google Tag Manager, and other relevant analytics and tracking tools to measure, report, and optimize PPC campaign performance.

Data Interpretation: Ability to analyze large datasets, interpret complex data, and turn insights into actionable strategies to optimize campaign performance.



Soft Skills:

Excellent Communication & Presentation Skills: Ability to explain complex PPC strategies and performance data in a clear, concise, and accessible manner for clients, internal teams, and stakeholders.

Client Management Experience: Proven experience in building and nurturing strong client relationships. Ability to manage client expectations and resolve issues in a timely and professional manner.

Problem-Solving & Proactive Mindset: Strong problem-solving skills, with a proactive approach to identifying and addressing campaign issues. Ability to think critically and take strategic action based on data.

Attention to Detail: High attention to detail, ensuring that campaign elements are precise and accurately reflect client objectives, even when working with large volumes of data.



How to Apply:

If you’re an experienced PPC Manager looking for a new challenge, we want to hear from you! Please submit your resume, along with a cover letter outlining your relevant experience here. Include any specific campaigns or achievements that highlight your expertise with Google Ads and Bing Ads.

title: Virtual Assistant - Graduate/Entry Position
description:
At Sylaba Translations, we offer highly personalised, professional multilingual translation services, plain language editing, and training programs.



We are a small company based in Australia, with Operations and Marketing teams based in the Philippines. We are a very close-knit group of like-minded people looking for the next addition to the team.



As a Project Coordinator, you will be responsible for the following:

- Managing translation projects from beginning to end.

- Setting priorities and delivering quality results on time.

- Communicate effectively whilst responding to stakeholder needs and expectations across a geographically dispersed network.

- To act with discretion and integrity in managing sensitive and confidential information

- Well-developed organisational skills, knowledge, and experience in successfully setting priorities and delivering quality results within allocated timeframes and managing self-imposed and given deadlines.

- Analytical abilities with the ability to obtain accurate conclusions and apply innovative initiatives while contributing to change and business improvement strategies.



Required attributes:

- Excellent customer service via phone calls and
s. 

- Capable of dealing with frequent constructive or negative feedback. 

- Good coping mechanisms working in a fast-paced and high-stress environment. 

- Willingness to work overtime to assist tea
mbers in completing projects. 



What’s in it for you:

- A 3-month probation period, followed by full-time employment. 

- Works hours from 9am to 6pm AEDT/AEST, including 1-hour unpaid break. 

- Monday to Friday, weekends off. 

- A 2–3-hour time difference between Australian and Philippines time.

- Australian public holidays off and paid after the probation period.  

- 2 weeks of paid annual leave post-probation period.

- Training will be  provided.



If you’re interested in applying for this position, please respond to the following questions and
 them to 
 along with your CV in PDF form, and write "Project Coordinator” in the subject line:



1) Please provide a work-related example of each of the attributes we are looking for in a candidate.



• Excellent customer service via phone calls and
s. 

- Capability to deal with frequent constructive or negative feedback. 

- Good coping mechanisms working in a fast-paced and high-stress environment.

title: Video Editor – Long Form & Short Form Content
description:
I'm looking for a solid video editor with a strong foundation in both long-form and short-form content. You don't have to have done everything — but you need to be adaptable, willing to learn, and able to deliver quality work across different types of projects.



What You'll Be Editing

The work will vary. One day it might be a YouTube video or podcast episode. The next it could be a church sermon, a corporate video, or branded social content. Long-form and short-form are the core skills — everything else builds from there.

What I'm Looking For



• Strong foundation in video editing — long-form and short-form

• Comfortable switching between project types without losing quality

• Can work with minimal direction once you understand the style

• Fast turnaround when needed — some projects will be time-sensitive

• Captions, lower thirds, and basic graphics are a must

• Willing to learn and grow with the work



What You Don't Need

• You don't have to be an expert in every format

• You don't need to have edited every type of content listed

• But you do need a portfolio that shows range and a willingness to take on whatever comes



Software

Preferred: Final Cut Pro X

Also accepted: Adobe Premiere Pro



To Apply



• Share 3–5 examples that show different types of content you've edited

• Tell me which format you're strongest in and what you're still developing

• Start your application with the word "adaptable" so I know you read this

title: PROPERTY MANAGER + CLEANING OPS ADMIN (BUILDIUM + JOBBER) — US REAL ESTATE COMPANY
description:
Employer: Heritage Property Management LLC (Sioux Falls, SD)

Hours: 40/week, Mon–Fri

Pay: $900–$1,100/month USD DOE

ABOUT US

You'll work directly under Heritage Property Management LLC, supporting two connected South Dakota businesses:



Heritage Property Management (
) — residential property management, long-term rentals plus a growing STR portfolio.

) — premium residential cleaning in Sioux Falls.



THE ROLE

One experienced VA running back-office ops across both companies. You'll be the owner's right hand — managing software, coordinating vendors, handling tenant and client communication, keeping the financial engine clean. Long-term, stable role. Not a generalist position. Hands-on Buildium experience required.

HERITAGE RESPONSIBILITIES (~70%)

NICE TO HAVE



Jobber experience

STR / Airbnb operations

QuickBooks

US real estate company experience



COMPENSATION



$900–$1,100/month DOE

13th month bonus after one year

90-day review with raise opportunity

Quarterly performance reviews with bonus opportunities



HIRING PROCESS

Permanent offer with full benefits

title: Social Media Content Creator (Jewelry Brand | AI + Video + Design | Part-Time Remote)
description:
**About Us**

We are a fast-growing fine jewelry e-commerce brand selling real gold jewelry (10k & 14k). We are looking for a creative and reliable content creator who understands how to create premium content that converts into sales.



---



**Job Overview**

We need someone to create and manage social media content including photos, videos, reels, and posts.

This is a **part-time remote position (~20 hours per week)**.



---



**Responsibilities**



* Create high-quality photo and video content for social media

* Produce Reels / TikTok-style videos (VERY IMPORTANT)

* Design graphics and edit content

* Post and schedule content consistently

* Maintain a premium brand look

* Research trends and apply them

* Use AI tools to create and improve content

* Write simple captions



---



**Requirements**



* Minimum 3+ years experience in social media/content creation

* Experience with product-based brands (jewelry is a big plus)

* Strong video editing skills (Reels, TikTok, short-form)

* Graphic design skills

* Familiar with:



  * CapCut / Premiere / Final Cut

  * Photoshop / Canva

* Must know how to use AI tools (VERY IMPORTANT):



  * ChatGPT

  * AI design tools (Midjourney, DALL·E, etc.)

  * AI content/video tools

* Good English communication

* Reliable and detail-oriented



---



**Work Setup**

* Remote

* ~20 hours per week

* Flexible hours but must be consistent



**Important:**

* Must use time tracking tool (TimeProof or similar)

* Work activity may be screen recorded during work hours



---



**Bonus (Nice to Have)**



* Jewelry or luxury brand experience

* Instagram / TikTok growth understanding

* Shopify or Etsy experience



---



**What We’re Looking For**



* Someone who can create content that sells (not just looks good)

* Fast and efficient

* Comfortable using AI to speed up work

* Understands premium branding



---



**To Apply (IMPORTANT)**

Include ALL of the following:



1. Portfolio (social media / video / design work)

2. 2–3 examples of reels or short-form videos

3. List of AI tools you have used

4. Experience with product or jewelry content

5. Your hourly rate



**Also:**

* Send 1 idea for a jewelry reel



Applications that do not follow instructions will be ignored.

title: Short-Form Content Creator - Instagram and TikTok
description:
About the Project:

Pushup Hunter is a gamified push-up app launching soon. Think Duolingo meets fitness RPG. Users do push-ups tracked by AI, compete in weekly leagues, level up their character, and earn rewards.

We're validating the idea through pre-sales and need someone to blow up our Instagram and TikTok to drive sign-ups.

---



The Role:

You'll own our Instagram and TikTok presence. 5 posts per day across both platforms. Your job is to understand the target audience and make content that gets people to stop scrolling and engage, gets shares, and drives people to our landing page.



This isn't about polished brand content. It's about understanding what goes viral in the fitness and gaming space, then applying that to Pushup Hunter. There's also a ton of posts in this space that can be used as inspiration (adding a twist to make it make sense for our app instead).



Platforms: Instagram + TikTok

Volume: 5 posts per day on Instagram, 1/day for TikTok (can cross-post the same Instagram content with tweaks)

Goal: Drive pre-sale sign-ups for our app

---



What You'll Do:



Content Creation

- Batch create and schedule 5 short-form videos per day

- Mix of content types: app demos, 
s, inspiration, trends, challenges

- Use trending sounds and formats

- Write hooks that stop the scroll

- Edit with captions, effects, and pacing that fits each platform (only if needed)



App Footage

- I'll provide screen recordings of the app for you to use

- You'll also get access to a test build to record your own footage as needed



Respond to Comments/DMS:

- Respond to all comments (keep the energy up)

- Respond to DMs (answer questions, direct to pre-sale link)

- Flag any important feedback or questions to me



Trend Hunting

- Stay on top of what's working in fitness and gaming content

- Spot trends early and adapt them to Pushup Hunter

- Study competitors and recreate what works (with our twist)

---



You're a Great Fit If You...

- Know what makes content go viral on Instagram Reels and TikTok (not just "good content" but actually viral)

- Can edit fast and scrappy (CapCut, Premiere, whatever works)

- Understand fitness content and/or gaming content culture

- Are plugged into trends daily (sounds, formats, 
s)

- Can write punchy hooks and captions

- Are comfortable with high volume (5/day is a lot, but it's how you find winners)

- Have examples of content you've made that performed well





If content hits well and pre-sales validate the idea, this becomes a longer-term role with bigger scope (YouTube Shorts, UGC coordination, etc.) and bigger pay.





Send me your previous work when applying.

- Brian

description:
**Title:**

---

Hi,

title: Turn Telegram Contacts into $5,000/Month: DeFi Protocol Needs BD Now
description:
Job Description:

We’re a DeFi protocol launching game-changing LP bond technology. We need Business Development partners who can introduce us to crypto launchpads, blockchain projects, and DeFi communities.





THE OPPORTUNITY:

Every successful introduction that leads to partnership earns you serious money. One good partnership could net you $5,000-10,000 in your first month.





COMPENSATION:

Monetize your network through three massive income streams: guaranteed ETH salary, instant token unlocks, and recurring commissions. We pay you to open doors you’ve already built, while we handle 100% of the closing.



Guaranteed Base Pay: You will receive $10/hour (capped at 10 hours/week),       for simply activating your network. 50% paid in Ethereum (ETH) for immediate cash and 50% in $GMI tokens, which are subject to an 18-month vesting schedule, building a long-term position in the $GMI mutli-chain ecosystem.



Performance Bonus: Every 5 successful partnership you close triggers an immediate unlock of 20% your vested tokens. This allows you to bypass the 18-month vesting period and access your earnings as soon as you deliver results.

Note: A "successful partnership" is defined by the project signing the LP Bonds integration agreement and going live on our marketplace.



Additional Commission: 

- 25% commission on ALL upgrade fees from your partnerships

- Level 2 upgrades: $40 upgrade fee, you get $10 each

- Level 3 upgrades: $80 upgrade fee, you get $20 each

- Level 4 upgrades: $160 upgrade fee, you get $40 each



-  $500 bonus when your partnerships hit 25 Level 4 bonds

-  $2,000 bonus at 100 Level 4 bonds

-  $5,000 bonus at 300 Level 4 bonds

-  Realistic month 1 earnings: $2,000-5,000

- Total 90-day potential: $20,000+



YOU HAVE:

- Existing connections in crypto (launchpads, DAOs, blockchain projects)

-
/
 relationships with project founders or marketing heads

- Understanding of DeFi/crypto space

- Hunger to earn based on results, not hours





YOU DON’T NEED:

- To close deals (I handle that)

- Any upfront investment

- Previous BD experience (connections matter more)

- Full-time commitment (work your own schedule)





THE ROLE:

Simply introduce me to decision-makers at crypto projects. I close the deals, you collect commissions. Every user from your partnerships who upgrades their bonds puts money in your pocket..

Example: ONE medium-sized launchpad partnership generating 100 L4 bonds = $8,000 for you.



Ready to turn your crypto connections into serious income?



Apply with:

- List 3-5 crypto projects/launchpads you have connections with

- Your
 handle

- Brief description of your crypto involvement



We need partners who see the opportunity and want to run with it. Start earning within days of your first successful introduction!

title: E-commerce Specialist (SEO, Shopify & Paid Media)
description:
E-commerce Specialist (SEO, Shopify & Paid Media)



Job Type: Full-Time



Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 7:00 AM to 4:00 PM PST, with a 1-hour break



Salary: $ 1,000/month



Job Overview: 



The E-commerce Specialist executes and optimizes the DTC eCommerce channel, supporting revenue growth across Shopify, organic search (SEO), and paid media (Google Ads). This role partners closely with the E-commerce Manager to translate strategy into results, while proactively identifying opportunities to improve traffic, conversion rates, and customer lifetime value.



The ideal candidate combines strong hands-on execution with a focus on Shopify optimization, SEO growth, and paid media performance (Google Ads), contributing to revenue growth and overall eCommerce performance.



Key Responsibilities: 



Shopify Store Management & Product Operations



Build and maintain product pages, collections, and landing pages optimized for conversion and SEO

Manage and optimize Shopify apps to improve site functionality and user experience

Merchandising & Conversion Optimization (CRO)



Execute merchandising strategies to promote key products, collections, and campaigns

Build and update promotional and campaign landing pages

Monitor site performance, troubleshoot issues, and identify opportunities to improve conversion rates

SEO & Organic Growth



Collaborate SEO strategy to increase market share and drive sustained growth in high-intent organic traffic and conversion rates.

Define and execute keyword strategy, on-page optimization, and content initiatives aligned with business and revenue goals.

Own optimization of product listings, category structures, and landing pages to maximize search visibility and performance.

Optimize product listings, collections, and landing pages for search visibility.

Monitor SEO performance metrics and continuously identify opportunities to improve traffic quality, rankings, and conversions .

Paid Media (Google Ads)



Support Google Ads campaigns (Search, Shopping, and Display)

Assist with keyword research, campaign setup, and bid optimization

Monitor performance metrics such as ROAS, CPC, and conversions

Collaborate on testing ad creatives and landing pages to improve performance

Analytics & Reporting



Track performance across Shopify, Google Analytics, SEO, and paid media channels

Analyze data to identify trends and opportunities for growth

Provide regular updates and insights to the E-commerce Manager

General Support



Execute tasks based on direction and SOPs

Collaborate with design, marketing, and customer service teams

Support additional eCommerce initiatives and ad hoc projects as needed

Qualifications:



3–5+ years of experience in an eCommerce or DTC environment

Hands-on experience with Shopify (product management, collections, landing pages, apps)

Working knowledge of SEO best practices (on-page optimization, keyword usage, basic technical SEO)

Experience with Google Ads (Search and/or Shopping preferred)

Familiarity with Google Analytics or similar analytics tools

Strong attention to detail and ability to execute accurately

Organized and able to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment

Strong communication skills and ability to follow direction

Proactive mindset with a willingness to learn and improve

Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Automation Specialist
description:
Automation Specialist, Contract, Project-Based

Remote | Must overlap with Pacific Time | Contractor role



We are hiring a project-based Automation Specialist to help improve internal operations workflows through practical automation, workflow design, and documentation.



This is not a full-time or part-time employee role. We are looking for someone who can take a messy manual process, organize it, and build a practical solution using tools like Airtable, Zapier, APIs, webhooks, Claude Code and Codex. We are starting with a paid trial project. If it is a strong fit, this may lead to ongoing project work.



This role is a fit for someone who has:

•Built real workflow automations

•Worked with APIs, webhooks, and structured data handoffs

•Designed internal operations workflows, not just marketing automations

•Turned incomplete or messy inputs into clear, usable systems

•Created documentation and handoff materials for non-technical users

•Scoped projects clearly, including timeline, cost, and dependencies

•Experience building automations for insurance, operations, finance, service, or document-heavy workflows preferred

•Must be comfortable working from incomplete SOPs and semi-structured source material

•Please do not apply if your experience is limited to no-code tutorials or AI prompt engineering without shipped workflow builds



You’ll be working on things like:

•Streamlining proposal creation workflows

•Improving intake, handoffs, and internal task flow

•Reducing manual rework and duplicate entry

•Designing exception handling for incomplete submissions

•Documenting the final workflow clearly for internal use



Tools / skills required

•Familiar with SaaS like Airtable and Zapier

•Works with Claude Code and Codex

•APIs and webhooks

•Workflow mapping / process design

•Documentation / SOP creation

•AI-assisted workflow support where appropriate



Strong preference for candidates who:

•Have experience with service-based or operations-heavy businesses

•Think practically and avoid overengineering

•Can explain tradeoffs clearly

•Can build quickly without needing perfect inputs



This is not a fit for:

•General virtual assistants

•Applicants who do not enjoy building new tools

•People whose experience is primarily social media, admin support, or prompt writing only

•Candidates looking for a salaried role (This may become Full Time once you have demonstrated your work)



To apply, please send:

1. A short summary of your relevant experience

2. The tools used in recent automation projects in your portfolio

3. A short Loom or written walkthrough of your portfolio

4. Your project pricing approach

5. Your availability and Pacific time overlap

6. Include in the subject line of your
: “I’m ready to automate your world! ????”

title: Social Media & Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
Job Title: Social Media & Operations Virtual Assistant

Company: AI4U



Reports to: Founder/CEO



Type: Part-time (10–20 hours/week) | Remote



Role Overview

AI4U is on a mission to humanize Artificial Intelligence for people who have zero technical background. We are looking for a proactive, tech-savvy Virtual Assistant to help build our online presence, manage short-form video content, and handle day-to-day administrative tasks. You will be the "engine" that allows the founder to focus on coaching and teaching.   In addition, you will support other admirative tasks related to content creation, management and administrative support (short/long term rental).



Key Responsibilities

Video Content Creation and Management: Create or Take "raw" footage provided by the founder and edit it into high-engagement Reels, TikToks, and YouTube Shorts (adding captions, transitions, and trending audio).



Social Media Distribution: Schedule and post daily content across Instagram, LinkedIn, and TikTok using platforms like Metricool, Buffer, or Later.



Engagement: Monitor comments and Direct Messages. Respond to basic inquiries and flag potential coaching leads for the founder.

 list, set up Zoom links for classes, and organize the "AI4U Mobile Setup" digital assets.

Required Skills & Qualifications

Video Editing: Proficiency in CapCut, Adobe Premiere Rush, or similar mobile-friendly video tools.



Social Media Savvy: Understanding of Instagram/TikTok algorithms and how to use hashtags and SEO effectively.



Communication: High-level English proficiency (written and verbal) with the ability to write in a friendly, "non-techy" tone.



Tool Kit: Familiarity with Canva, Google Workspace, and ChatGPT.



Attributes: Highly organized, proactive (you look for solutions before asking), and passionate about learning new technology.



Preferred Experience

Proficient understanding of
 marketing (e.g., Mailchimp or ConvertKit).

Prior experience managing a professional Instagram account.

Spanish language

title: Digital Marketing Account Management VA
description:
Job Opportunity: Marketing Account Management VA



Company: Pizza Cake Digital



Location: Remote (Philippines-Based)



Work Hours: Part-Time to Full-Time (20–40 hours/week)



Schedule: Partial or Full Overlap with North American Business Hours



About Pizza Cake Digital

First established in 2017, Pizza Cake Digital is a boutique marketing firm serving high-quality clients across music, festivals, entertainment, media, tech, gaming, and more.



As a boutique agency, we get up close and personal with our clients. We value substance over fluff. We proactively offer insights to move the needle for our clients, staying directly engaged in the activities that drive real results. We are looking for an organized, proactive Account Operations Assistant to support our Account Management team in delivering excellence.



The Role



You will be the "right hand" to our Account Manager. Your primary goal is to handle the operational and administrative engine that allows our Account Manager to focus on client strategy and high-level communication. You will play a vital role in the lifecycle of marketing campaigns, from organizing assets for a music festival to pulling the data that proves our success.



Key Responsibilities



Project Coordination: 

- Assist the Account Manager in assigning and tracking tasks for the creative, social, and digital advertising teams.

- Ensure deadlines are being met internally.



Meeting Support: 

- Prepare meeting agendas, attend client calls to take detailed notes, and immediately translate those notes into actionable tasks in our project management system (ClickUp).



Music & Festival Marketing Logistics: 

- Organize high volumes of creative assets (video, photo, graphics).

- Distribute assets to external partners via
 and track their posting schedules and performance.



Reporting & Data: 

- Weekly data entry and reporting from social media platforms and posts. Highlight key wins and areas for improvement.



Quality Control: 

- Proofread and check accuracy of social media copy, tagged page handles, dates, times, event information, ticket link and creator credits.

- Review creative assets to ensure everything is post-ready before final approval.



Media Organization: 

- Sorting photo and video capture from events into relevant folders based on content type within Google Drive. 

- Add key words to file names for searchability. 

- Review previously published media and ensuring it’s archived to not be reused.



General Admin: 

- Assist with scheduling and managing the "odd tasks" that come with a fast-paced boutique agency.



Requirements

Experience: 2+ years of experience in a digital marketing assistant or project coordination role (agency experience is a major plus). 



BONUS: Any kind of event, festival or concert marketing experience is a huge plus.



Tech Savvy: Familiarity with project management tools (ClickUp, Asana, etc.) and communication tools (
, Slack, Zoom) and Google Suite (Sheets, Docs, Drive).



Marketing Knowledge: A baseline understanding of social media management, paid digital advertising, and
/SMS marketing.



Organization: You are someone who finds peace in a clean spreadsheet and a completed to-do list.



Communication: Excellent written and verbal English skills. You can communicate clearly and professionally with internal tea
mbers.



Industry Interest: A genuine interest in the music, festival, and entertainment space.



Why Work With Pizza Cake?



Work with exciting clients in the music and live entertainment industry.



Direct mentorship from experienced leadership who value your growth.



A "substance over fluff" culture where your work actually impacts the business.



Long-term growth potential as the agency expands.

title: Real Estate Operations Assistant
description:
About the Role:



Are you an experienced Virtual Professional in the Real Estate space looking for a stable, long-term career where you can truly take charge? This is not just another task-based VA job. We are looking for a Virtual Property Operations Coordinator to be the heart of our US-based rental property business.



You will be the single point of command for our entire rental portfolio, managing everything from tenant relations to coordinating our maintenance team. We need a true leader who is organized, resourceful, and ready to own the operational success of our properties from the comfort of your home.



Your Key Responsibilities (What You'll Do):



1. Tenant & Leasing Management:

Own the entire leasing process: from handling inquiries and screening tenants to preparing and managing digital lease agreements.

Be the friendly face of our company: Serve as the main contact for all tenant needs, providing excellent and professional customer service.

Manage tenant lifecycle: Skillfully coordinate smooth move-ins and move-outs, including inspections and security deposit returns.

Ensure timely payments: Oversee rent collection and professionally manage the eviction process when necessary, following all procedures.



2. Maintenance & Project Coordination:

Command the maintenance workflow: Receive, prioritize, and dispatch our maintenance team and vendors to resolve property issues.

Run the projects: Coordinate property turnovers and minor renovations, creating schedules and ensuring they stay on track and within budget.

Be the resource manager: Order supplies and materials needed for jobs, manage vendor relationships, and ensure our team has what they need to succeed.



3. Operations & Admin Support:

Be the keeper of records: Maintain perfectly organized digital files for all properties, tenants, and work orders in our property management software.

Watch the budget: Track all maintenance and project expenses, review invoices, and help us run a cost-efficient operation.

Who We Are Looking For (The Ideal Candidate):



You are a Resourceful Problem-Solver: You can think on your feet and find solutions, whether it's a tenant issue or a logistical challenge with a repair.

You have an Owner's Mindset: You treat the properties and the business as if they were your own, taking pride in their success.

You are a Master Organizer: You love systems, checklists, and processes. You can juggle tenant needs and maintenance schedules without missing a beat.

You are a Natural Leader & Communicator: You can provide empathetic support to a tenant and give clear, direct instructions to a maintenance technician.



Qualifications:

Proven experience as a Virtual Assistant in Property Management is essential. Your background must include both tenant relations and maintenance coordination.

Confident in your ability to direct tea
mbers and manage vendors.

Strong understanding of the US real estate rental process (leasing, tenant laws, etc.).

Experience managing schedules, ordering materials, and tracking budgets.

Comfortable working full-time on a US time zone schedule (graveyard shift).

You must have your own reliable, high-speed internet connection and a quiet, dedicated workspace at home.



Apply Here:

title: Long-Form Video Editor — YouTube Content Agency
description:
We are an established YouTube content agency producing premium long-form videos across multiple high-performing client channels. We're growing fast and looking for a dedicated long-form editor who is serious about their craft, excellent with clients, and ready for consistent, well-paid work.



About the Work

You'll be editing sit-down talking head videos, typically 12–20 minutes in final length. This isn't assembly-line editing — every video should feel intentional. Heavy, purposeful B-roll usage, clean and creative on-screen text, strong retention-based pacing, and a genuine understanding of how to hold a viewer's attention from hook to close. You'll work across multiple client channels, each with their own style, voice, and audience.



What We're Looking For

Technical:

Expert-level command of Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro. Deep knowledge of copyright rules around music, footage, graphics, and sound effects — and skilled at sourcing properly licensed or copyright-free assets. You know what retention editing actually means and you execute it, not just in theory.



Creative:

You bring ideas to the edit. You suggest a better transition, a tighter hook, a smarter B-roll choice. You don't just execute — you elevate. You understand that good storytelling and good editing are the same thing.



Communication & Reliability — this is non-negotiable:

You respond quickly. Within a few hours during US business hours, not the next day. You communicate proactively — if something needs clarification, you ask before you assume. If a deadline is at risk, you say so early. You take feedback the right way: without ego, with speed, and with attention to what was actually said. Clients interact with our editors directly and you'll represent this agency — your communication needs to be professional, warm, and clear at all times.



Availability:

You must be available and responsive during US business hours. Full edits delivered within 48–72 hours of receiving raw files.

What You'll Get



Ongoing, stable, full-time work — this is not a one-off gig. Pay is output and quality based, and our best editors earn well into the thousands per month. The better you perform, the more work, higher pay, and greater responsibility you earn. We grow people who perform.



How to Apply

Reply with a short intro about yourself and links to previous long-form editing work or YouTube channels you've worked on. Shortlisted candidates will be sent a short trial clip — this is how we find our best editors. Best work wins the role.

title: Electrical or mechanical engineer
description:
I am looking for an electrical or mechanical engineer to build a prototype.  Degree and qualifications not strictly required but the device is expected to work.  Education in the field an asset.  

The prototype consist of the following:  

1.  A box.

2.  Inside the box are three sets of generators connected to each other via a weight.  The sets are attached via screws or other means to the box and arranged on the three spacial axis.  

3.  The power from these generators is inverted to DC current and sent to a meter that records the amount of energy generated.  

4.  The box must be light enough and small enough to send through the mail to Canada.  

The idea is that this device will capture energy from movement much like an automatic watch does.  Upon completion the device will be mailed to an address in Canada and one time payment will be made.

title: Accounting Manager ( Construction)
description:
This role is based in Cebu metro office. Relocation package offered and Family Health Insurance. This is not a remote or work from home position.  



The Accounting Manager  is responsible for managing the financial operations of a construction business, ensuring accurate job costing, financial reporting, and compliance with New Zealand regulatory requirements. This role plays a key part in supporting project performance, cash flow management, and commercial decision-making across multiple construction projects.

 

Key Responsibilities

• Lead and manage the day-to-day accounting function

• Oversee and review project/job costing, ensuring accurate allocation of labour, materials, and overheads

• Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements

• Manage work-in-progress (WIP) reporting, revenue recognition, and project margin analysis

• Ensure compliance with NZ accounting standards and tax regulations (including GST)

• Oversee accounts payable and receivable, including supplier payments and progress claim invoicing

• Monitor cash flow, including forecasting project-based inflows and outflows

• Manage month-end and year-end close processes

• Maintain and improve financial controls, systems, and processes

• Use Excel and Xero for accounting, reporting, and system optimisation

• Support budgeting and forecasting at both company and project level

• Provide financial insights to project managers and senior leadership

• Liaise with external accountants, auditors, and tax advisors

• Ensure accurate payroll processing, including contractor and subcontractor payments

• Track and report on retention balances and contract variations

 

Skills & Experience

• Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field

• ACCA or CPA or equivalent qualification preferred 

• 5+ years’ accounting experience, ideally within  international construction or project-based environments

• Strong understanding of job costing, WIP, and revenue recognition in construction preferred but not essential.

• Experience using Xero

• Knowledge of NZ tax requirements, including GST and contractor payments

• High attention to detail and strong analytical capability

• Strong communication skills, particularly with non-financial stakeholders (e.g., project managers)

• Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines

• Prior experience managing a small team. 



 

Key Competencies

• Commercial awareness and project-focused thinking

• Leadership and team development

• Problem-solving and decision-making

• Strong organisational and time management skills

• Continuous improvement mindset

title: Invoicing Specialist
description:
Invoicing Specialist (Remote)

Time Zone Overlap Requirements

Must provide at least 4 hours of consistent availability overlapping with PST business hours

Compensation & Benefits

Hourly Rate: $4 – $6 USD/hour

Estimated Monthly: P39,600 – P59,400

Estimated Annual: P475,200 – P712,800 (based on 40 hours/week)

Payment Frequency: Biweekly

Payment Method: Bank Transfer



Role Overview

The Invoicing Specialist is responsible for the accurate and timely generation, validation, and delivery of customer invoices in alignment with company SOPs and service-level expectations. This role plays a critical part in maintaining cash flow, reducing billing errors, and ensuring a high level of customer trust.



Key Responsibilities

Invoice Processing & Management

Generate and post customer invoices based on shipped orders and supporting documentation

Ensure all invoices are completed within the 48-hour invoicing SLA

Review sales orders, purchase orders, and shipping data to confirm invoicing accuracy

Identify and resolve discrepancies prior to invoice posting



Invoice Delivery & Tracking

Send invoices to correct customer contacts and confirm successful delivery

Monitor “not sent” or pending invoices and ensure completion

Maintain accurate records of invoice status and follow-up actions



Customer Billing Support

Respond to customer inquiries related to invoices, billing discrepancies, and payment status

Coordinate with internal teams (Sales, Purchasing, Accounting) to resolve billing issues



Reporting & Reconciliation

Run and maintain invoicing reports (e.g., shipped not invoiced, open invoices, summary billing)

Reconcile invoice data between systems to ensure completeness and accuracy

Flag trends or recurring issues impacting invoicing accuracy or timing



Process Adherence & Improvement

Follow structured SOPs for invoicing workflows and exception handling

Escalate issues (e.g., missing PO, incorrect billing details) per defined processes

Contribute to continuous improvement by identifying gaps or inefficiencies



Required Skills & Qualifications
